{{Quote|Weizel has a track record for forging ties with political leaders in potentially unfriendly territory.|[[Greng Tabbe]]|<ref name="NewsNets 7">{{JournalCite|7|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
'''Gerald Weizel''' became [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|He has the savvy to hold his own with Chandrila's formidable political personalities, and obviously, Coruscant hopes he has what it takes to bring Chandrila further into the Imperial fold.|[[Amier Candle]]|<ref name="NewsNets 7" />}}
Weizel was once governor of [[Dakshee]], where he managed to [[Dakshee affair|counter]] the [[Justice Action Network]] terrorist group without bloodshed. He also resolved the [[Brella Temior crisis]]. [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Jamson Caglio]] later backed Weizel in replacing [[Grandon Holleck]] as governor of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. His appointment as governor in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] was a victory for [[Rufaan Tigellinus]], Weizel's patron.
